channel.title: Classified Projects on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Classified Projects on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Lenticular Reentry Vehicle
item.description:
The Lenticular Reentry Vehicle (LRV) was a secret Cold War-era project developed by North American Aviation under the management of Wright-Patterson Air Force Base. Declassified documents from 1999 describe the craft as a 40-foot, saucer-shaped vessel designed for crewed orbital missions, though there is no official confirmation that it ever flew. While some have linked the project to military flying saucer theories, technical analysis indicates that the LRV functioned more like a conventional space capsule than the anomalous craft frequently reported in UFO sightings. Research into the vehicle grew out of previous initiatives like the Pye Wacket project, which explored the feasibility of lenticular-shaped defensive systems.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lenticular_Reentry_Vehicle
